tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsConnectionsConnectionSchemaMetadataRefresh

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsConnectionsCreate

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsConnectionsList
tools.description: Lists Connections in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsConnectionsPatch
tools.description: Updates the parameters of a single Connection.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsConnectionsRuntimeActionSchemasList
tools.description: List schema of a runtime actions filtered by action name.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsConnectionsRuntimeEntitySchemasList
tools.description: List schema of a runtime entities filtered by entity name.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsOperationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsProvidersConnectorsList
tools.description: Lists Connectors in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsProvidersConnectorsVersionsGet
tools.description: Gets details of a single connector version.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsProvidersConnectorsVersionsList
tools.description: Lists Connector Versions in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsProvidersGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsProvidersList
tools.description: Lists Providers in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsProvidersSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.connectorsProjectsLocationsProvidersTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
